subject: [PATCH v1 13/17] fuse: add passthrough support for atomic file creation

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds support for atomic file creation through the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) interface. When FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO is enabled, it allows the server to return a backing id, which associates the newly created inode with the backing file for passthrough operations before the dentry is instantiated. The patch modifies the fuse_create_open function to use either the original entry_out structure or the new entry2_out structure depending on whether FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO is enabled. It also introduces a new variable, backing_id, to store the returned backing id from the server. This allows for more efficient and atomic file creation operations.
